## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up and personal update between Natalie (OpenAI) and Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital)](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel quit his job at Crown to focus on his growing personal company, fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Natalie received a new role at OpenAI under the new VP of Global Affairs, Chris Lehain](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Marcel's company, growthhacks.ai, is using AI workflows for content generation and other services, growing rapidly with 19 customers and $178k/month in retainers](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [Potential collaboration discussed between Marcel's AI workflows and Natalie's OpenAI community initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)

## Topics

### Personal Updates

  - [Marcel: Left job at Crown to focus on personal company; fwd.digital growing rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Natalie: New role at OpenAI under VP of Global Affairs; considering relocation options](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Both discussed challenges and growth in their respective careers](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

### AI Workflow Business (growthhacks.ai)

  - [19 customers, $178k/month in retainers](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [Uses OpenAI API for complex, 100+ step workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Focus on content generation with 70% profit margin](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Hired CTO from IfThisThenThat background](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Aiming to scale by building agents that create workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)

### OpenAI Community Initiatives

  - [Natalie managing community tied to business verticals (healthcare, science, creativity, education)](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Focus on higher education, bringing in experts like PhDs and Nobel laureates](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Potential collaboration discussed to showcase Marcel's AI workflows to academic stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [Marcel open to scaling down workshops for OpenAI community](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Possibility of presenting use cases that OpenAI cares about](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Natalie offered to host technical sessions and provide a platform for Marcel's work](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Housing and Personal Life

  - [Discussed Oakland Hills living experience](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send Natalie information about his webinars and workshops](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [Explore potential for Marcel to present AI workflows in OpenAI community forum](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Natalie to consider hosting Marcel's workshop or webinar in the OpenAI community](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
  - [Plan for Natalie's next visit to the Bay Area, potentially with JT](https://fathom.video/share/Va8qK43vzZtJTLBDzbttieUTnqXCvCv3?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
